title: Logical error: 'Bad cast from type DB::ColumnVector<unsigned long> to DB::ColumnTuple'
description:
```sql
create table test (`n.a` Array(Tuple(aa UInt64))) engine=Memory;
insert into test select [tuple(1), tuple(2), tuple(3)];
alter table test add column `n.b` Array(Tuple(bb UInt64));
select * from test;
```

It's related to `Nested` and code in `fillMissingColumns` in `inplaceBlockConversions.cpp`. @CurtizJ please, take a look
bug_features_seed: INSERT INTO test1 SELECT jsonb_build_array(jsonb_build_object('aa', 1, 'bb', 2), jsonb_build_object('aa', 3, 'bb', 4), jsonb_build_object('aa', 5, 'bb', 6));
ALTER TABLE test1 ADD COLUMN n_c JSONB DEFAULT '[{"cc": 0, "dd": 0}]';
SELECT n_a, n_c FROM test1 WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM jsonb_array_elements(n_a) AS x WHERE (x->>'aa')::int > 2);
CREATE TABLE test2 AS SELECT * FROM test1;
key_bug_features: Bad cast from ColumnVector to ColumnTuple
